title: Failed Login Rate Limiting and Account Lock

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, OAuth2/OIDC, local encrypted SQLite, device secure enclave

description: Limit brute-force attempts and protect accounts during repeated authentication failures.
acceptanceCriteria: After 5 failed login attempts within 300 seconds, the account must be locked for 900 seconds.
During lockout, all login attempts must return a lock message within 250 ms after server response is received.
Lockout counters must reset after 1800 seconds with no further failed attempts.

title: Transfer Confirmation Screen Render Time

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, CDN for static assets, local encrypted SQLite cache

description: Ensure transfer confirmation UI remains responsive after user inputs and server validations.
acceptanceCriteria: P95 time from tapping 'Continue' to fully rendered confirmation screen must be <= 1.2 seconds on 4G with 80–120 ms RTT.
Client-side validation must complete within 120 ms for inputs up to 140 characters in reference message.
Confirmation screen memory footprint must not exceed 220 MB during rendering on devices with 4 GB RAM.

title: Payment Submission Idempotency and Duplicate Prevention

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, idempotency keys, encrypted local draft store

description: Prevent duplicate payments caused by retries, network drops, or app restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: Payment initiation must include an idempotency key and must prevent duplicate creation with >= 99.999% effectiveness.
If a retry occurs within 60 seconds, the backend must return the original payment status within 400 ms P95.
After an app restart, any pending payment draft must be recoverable within 3.0 seconds P95.

title: Touch Target Size and One-Handed Usability

context.architecture: Native iOS UI, design system components, local encrypted SQLite

standard: WCAG 2.2 AA / Apple Human Interface Guidelines
description: Ensure primary actions are reachable and tappable with reduced user error on mobile screens.
acceptanceCriteria: All primary action touch targets must be at least 44x44 pt and have >= 8 pt spacing to adjacent targets.
The 'Confirm' button must be reachable without scrolling on screens >= 375 px width in portrait orientation at 100% zoom.
Mis-tap rate during usability test (n>=10) must be <= 3% for primary actions (Pay/Transfer/Confirm).

title: Secure Local Data Retention and Wipe on Logout

context.architecture: Local encrypted SQLite, secure enclave keychain, remote logout endpoint

description: Ensure sensitive cached data is retained minimally and wiped securely when session ends.
acceptanceCriteria: On logout, cached balances and transaction details must be wiped within 2 seconds and not recoverable via app UI.
Local encrypted database size must not exceed 50 MB for cached user data (excluding app binaries).
After remote logout, app must invalidate tokens and require re-authentication within 60 seconds.

title: Push Notification Delivery and App Wake Time

context.architecture: Microservices, event bus, APNs push gateway, local encrypted SQLite

description: Ensure timely delivery and handling of security and payment notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Security alert push notification must be delivered to device within 10 seconds P95 after event creation.
From tapping a notification to displaying the relevant screen must be <= 1.8 seconds P95 on 4G.
Background fetch triggered by notification must complete within 2.5 seconds P95.

title: Service Degradation Handling for Account Summary

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, feature flags, circuit breakers, local cache fallback

description: Provide graceful degradation when backend services are partially unavailable.
acceptanceCriteria: If /accounts/summary fails with 5xx, app must fall back to cached data within 300 ms after failure detection.
Circuit breaker must open after 3 consecutive failures within 30 seconds and remain open for at least 60 seconds.
User must be shown an explicit 'stale data' indicator when cached data age exceeds 300 seconds.

title: Error Copy Clarity for Security Blocks

context.architecture: Native iOS UI, localization module, server-provided error codes

description: Ensure security-related blocks are explained clearly and actionably to users.
acceptanceCriteria: For lockout or blocked actions, the error message must include a next-step instruction in <= 120 characters (EN).
Error screen must render within 250 ms after receiving the error response.
At least 95% of users (n>=20) must correctly identify the required next step in a comprehension test within 30 seconds.

title: Sensitive Screenshots and App Switcher Obfuscation

context.architecture: Native iOS UI, secure screen overlays, encrypted local storage

description: Prevent leakage of sensitive data through screenshots or app switcher previews.
acceptanceCriteria: When the app goes to background, the app switcher preview must be obfuscated within 200 ms.
Screenshots must be blocked or redacted on screens containing balances or full account numbers with 100% coverage.
Obfuscation must not increase foreground resume time by more than 150 ms P95.

title: Statement Download Performance and Size Limits

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, document service, CDN, local encrypted storage

description: Ensure bank statement download is efficient and does not degrade app performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Downloading a PDF statement up to 8 MB must complete within 6.0 seconds P95 on 4G (10 Mbps).
Statement viewer must open within 1.2 seconds P95 after download completes.
During download and open, app RAM usage must not exceed 280 MB.

title: Order Allocation API Throughput

context.architecture: Web SPA + REST APIs, allocation service, PostgreSQL, Redis, async workers
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Support fast allocation of orders to pick waves during peak load.
acceptanceCriteria: Allocation endpoint must sustain 200 allocations/second for 30 minutes with error rate <= 0.5%.
P95 latency for POST /allocation must be <= 450 ms at 600 concurrent users.
Wave creation UI must show allocation completion status within 3.0 seconds P95.

title: Input Validation for Location and Quantity Adjustments

context.architecture: Web SPA, REST APIs, validation service, PostgreSQL transactions
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Prevent injection and unsafe operations in inventory adjustments.
acceptanceCriteria: Location code must match regex ^[A-Z]{1,3}-[0-9]{1,4}-[A-Z]{1,3}$ and reject invalid input within 200 ms.
Quantity adjustments must accept integers in range -9999 to 9999; values outside must be rejected with HTTP 400 in <= 150 ms P95.
Requests containing SQL meta-characters in free-text fields (';','--','/*') must be rejected 100% of the time.

title: Message Queue Backpressure and Safe Degradation

context.architecture: REST APIs, message queue for async tasks, worker autoscaling, PostgreSQL
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Maintain system stability when asynchronous processing lags behind incoming workload.
acceptanceCriteria: If queue depth exceeds 100,000 messages, system must enable backpressure within 60 seconds (e.g., throttle non-critical endpoints).
Under backpressure, critical workflows (pick/ship) must maintain P95 latency <= 600 ms.
Queue processing must recover to depth < 20,000 within 15 minutes after load returns to normal (<= 5,000 msg/min).

title: Usable Pagination and Filtering for Inventory Search

context.architecture: Web SPA, REST APIs, server-side filtering, indexed search fields
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure inventory search remains usable and efficient for warehouse users.
acceptanceCriteria: Changing a filter must update results within 800 ms P95 for result sets up to 50,000 items.
Pagination must support page sizes 25/50/100; switching page size must complete within 900 ms P95.
Search field must accept 1–64 characters and show validation errors within 150 ms for longer inputs.

title: CSRF Protection and SameSite Cookies

context.architecture: Web SPA, REST APIs, session cookies, CSRF tokens, reverse proxy
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Protect session-based operations from CSRF and session fixation risks.
acceptanceCriteria: All state-changing requests must require a valid CSRF token and reject missing/invalid tokens with HTTP 403 in <= 150 ms.
Session cookies must use SameSite=Lax or Strict and must be flagged Secure and HttpOnly (100% coverage).
Session identifier must rotate within 2 seconds after privilege elevation (e.g., role change).

title: Label Printing Response Time

context.architecture: Web SPA, REST print service, printer gateway, job queue
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure label print requests are processed quickly to avoid line stoppage.
acceptanceCriteria: P95 time from clicking 'Print' to job accepted by print queue must be <= 500 ms.
For a batch of 200 labels, job creation must complete within 4.0 seconds P95.
Print service must handle 50 concurrent print requests with error rate <= 1% over 15 minutes.

title: Database Failover Transparency for Read Operations

context.architecture: PostgreSQL replication, read replicas, connection pooling, retry policies
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure read operations remain available during database failover events.
acceptanceCriteria: During read-replica failover, inventory read endpoints must maintain availability >= 99.9% per month.
Client-visible errors during failover must be <= 0.5% of requests over a 10-minute failover window.
Automatic retry for transient DB errors must complete within 2 retries and total additional delay <= 800 ms.

title: Form Validation Feedback Timing for Shipping

context.architecture: Web SPA, REST APIs, client-side + server-side validation
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Provide fast, precise validation feedback to reduce shipping errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Client-side validation messages must display within 120 ms after input blur.
Server-side validation errors must render in UI within 300 ms after response receipt.
Address line fields must accept 1–60 characters; values > 60 must be rejected and highlighted with 100% field-level accuracy.

title: Audit Log Integrity and Retention

context.architecture: Append-only audit log, immutable storage tier, centralized logging
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure audit logs are tamper-evident, complete, and retained for investigations.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit events for pick/pack/ship must be written within 1 second P95 of transaction commit for 99.9% of events.
Audit log retention must be >= 730 days and retrieval for a 7-day window must complete within 3.0 seconds for up to 200,000 events.
Any attempt to delete or alter audit records must be denied 100% of the time and logged within 500 ms.

title: Concurrent RF Scanner Sessions Performance

context.architecture: Web SPA, REST APIs, session store, Redis cache, autoscaling app tier
context.platform: Rugged browser terminals (Chrome), RF scanners on Wi-Fi, warehouse staff

description: Maintain responsiveness for scanner-driven workflows during high concurrency.
acceptanceCriteria: System must support 800 concurrent scanner sessions with P95 latency <= 400 ms for scan submit endpoint.
Session store operations must complete within 30 ms P95 at 2,000 ops/second.
Overall error rate must remain <= 1.0% during 45 minutes of sustained peak scanning.

title: High Availability for Alerting Service

context.architecture: Rules engine, alerting microservice, multi-zone deployment, message queue
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

standard: Medical Service SLA / Business Continuity Plan
description: Ensure alerting remains available and timely during component failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Alerting service monthly availability must be >= 99.95%.
During single-zone failure, critical alert generation latency must remain <= 5.0 seconds P95.
Failed alert deliveries must be retried up to 5 times within 300 seconds with backoff starting at 5 seconds.

title: Secure Firmware Update Delivery

context.architecture: IoT devices, signed firmware packages, update service, secure boot

description: Ensure firmware updates are authenticated, integrity-checked, and safely applied.
acceptanceCriteria: Firmware packages must be signed and signature verification must succeed before install in 100% of cases.
Device must reject unsigned or tampered firmware within 2 seconds of verification start.
Firmware update download must support resume and must complete within 20 minutes for packages up to 50 MB on 10 Mbps connection.

title: Clinician Alert Inbox Load Time

context.architecture: Clinician web console, alert store, indexed queries, CDN

description: Keep alert triage workflow responsive under large alert volumes.
acceptanceCriteria: Alert inbox must load and become interactive within 2.0 seconds P95 for up to 5,000 alerts.
Filtering by severity must return results within 900 ms P95.
Opening a single alert detail view must complete within 700 ms P95.

title: Alarm Sound/Visual Distinction and Accessibility

context.architecture: Alerting service, clinician console UI, notification settings

description: Ensure alarms are distinguishable and accessible for clinicians in high-stress environments.
acceptanceCriteria: Critical vs non-critical alarms must be distinguishable without color alone, achieving text/icon contrast ratio >= 4.5:1.
Alarm acknowledgement control must be reachable via keyboard in <= 6 tab stops.
Notification settings changes must apply within 30 seconds and be persisted with 100% success rate.

title: Least-Privilege Access to Patient Streams

context.architecture: RBAC/ABAC authorization, audit logging, time-series DB

description: Ensure clinicians only access patient data they are authorized to view.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthorized patient stream access must return HTTP 403 within 200 ms P95.
Policy decision evaluation must complete within 30 ms P95 at 1,000 authorization checks/second.
All PHI access attempts (allowed or denied) must be audit-logged within 1 second P95.

title: Clock Drift Handling for Time-Series Accuracy

context.architecture: IoT devices, NTP sync, ingestion normalization, time-series DB

description: Maintain accurate timestamping and ordering of telemetry despite device clock drift.
acceptanceCriteria: Device clock drift beyond ±5 seconds must be detected within 2 minutes of ingestion.
Server-side normalization must correct ordering for drift up to ±30 seconds with 99.9% success rate.
If drift exceeds ±30 seconds, system must flag the stream and notify within 60 seconds.

title: Rules Engine Evaluation Throughput

context.architecture: Stream processing, rules engine, autoscaling compute, message queue
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Sustain continuous rules evaluation for large device fleets without lag.
acceptanceCriteria: Rules engine must sustain 25,000 messages/second with P95 evaluation latency <= 120 ms per message.
Scaling event must add capacity within 3 minutes when CPU exceeds 70% for 120 seconds.
Under peak load, critical rule miss rate must be <= 0.1% (missed threshold breaches).

title: Clinician Workflow Efficiency for Patient Assignment

context.architecture: Clinician web console, patient directory, RBAC, audit logging

description: Enable fast, low-error assignment of patients to clinician teams.
acceptanceCriteria: Searching for a patient by identifier must return results within 800 ms P95 for up to 200,000 patients.
Assign/unassign action must complete within 1.0 second P95 and show confirmation within 200 ms after response receipt.
In usability testing (n>=10), median time to assign 5 patients must be <= 60 seconds with <= 1 error per user.

title: Telemetry Payload Size and Field Whitelisting

context.architecture: MQTT ingestion, schema validation, field whitelist, anomaly detection

description: Prevent malformed or oversized telemetry from impacting availability and data quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Telemetry payload must not exceed 32 KB; larger payloads must be rejected within 100 ms P95.
Only whitelisted fields must be accepted; unknown fields must be dropped with >= 99.99% accuracy and logged within 1 second.
Schema validation must complete within 15 ms P95 at 10,000 messages/second.

title: End-to-End Telemetry Completeness SLO

context.architecture: IoT devices, MQTT broker, ingestion, time-series DB, monitoring
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Ensure the system consistently captures and persists incoming telemetry with minimal loss.
acceptanceCriteria: End-to-end telemetry persistence success rate must be >= 99.7% per 24-hour window.
For any 5-minute window, missing telemetry points must not exceed 0.5% per device at normal sampling rate.
If persistence success rate drops below 99.5% for 10 consecutive minutes, an incident alert must trigger within 60 seconds.
